Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 751}Those posters and paintings... I used to be a little into that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 751}But between you and me, I only did it because everyone else was.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 751}At the time, I was so pumped... I thought I was doing something great.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 751}But now I can look back on it and realize how dumb I was.[n]{f 1 1}
